ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SF) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Dominant shooting hand (left or right) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current head coach */,
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the general manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2017-18, 2022-23) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league during the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "finals_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the finals */,
  "all_star_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the All-Star game */,
  "lockout" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if there was a lockout during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "minutes_on" INTEGER /* Total minutes the player played */,
  "minutes_off" INTEGER /* Total minutes the player was on the bench */,
  "seconds_per_poss_offense_on" REAL /* Seconds per possession when the player is on the court */,
  "seconds_per_poss_offense_off" REAL /* Seconds per possession when the player is off the court */,
  "seconds_per_poss_offense_on_off" REAL /* Difference in seconds per possession when the player is on and off the court */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games the player started */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of schedule rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, coach, executive) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player performance record being accessed */,
  "team_performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES player_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_performance_id") REFERENCES team_performance ("team_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "home_team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team's coach */,
  "away_team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team's coach */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head referee */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's highlights or recap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (null if still active) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., starter, bench) */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active, injured, suspended) */,
  "minutes_played_season" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "average_minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., day-to-day, out for the season) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Body part affected by the injury */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "injury_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
